title: 120pk Lollipop Sticks
features: Craft sticks 120pk great for creating decorations and figures
Various Coloured wooden lolly sticks for children's craft and art projects
Standard size coloured lolly sticks, supplied in packs of 120
120 pcs included has blue, orange, red, yellow, green and sky blue colors packs.
Perfect for children art projects like group activities, rainy day projects, classroom use, camp and scout crafts, birthday parties etc.
